name: VideoClipExtractor
description: Autonomous content-extraction skill that converts long-form media into high-impact short-form video clips through transcription, semantic analysis, and automated clipping. Supports both OpenAI and open-source models for maximum flexibility.
author: dejagold123

video_url.description: URL of the video to process (YouTube, HTTP(S), or local path)

max_clips.description: Maximum number of clips to extract (1-10)

min_clip_seconds.description: Minimum duration of each clip in seconds (≥5)

max_clip_seconds.description: Maximum duration of each clip in seconds (≤180)

llm_provider.description: LLM provider for moment ranking: 'openai' (GPT-4o-mini, default), 'mistral' (Mistral API), 'llama' (local Llama-2 GGUF), 'phi' (local Phi-3), or 'local' (Ollama)

stt_provider.description: Speech-to-text provider: 'openai' (Whisper API, default), 'vosk' (local, offline), or 'wav2vec' (Meta, local)

webhook_url.description: Optional webhook URL to notify when job completes (for async agents)

job_id.description: Unique identifier for this extraction job

status.description: Current job status in the processing pipeline

clips.description: Array of extracted clips with metadata

clip_filename.description: Filename of the produced clip, e.g. used as GET /clips/{filename}

download_url.description: Full URL (absolute if KLIPP_BASE_URL is set, otherwise relative) to download the clip

reason.description: AI-generated reason why this moment is engaging

actions.name: submit_job
actions.description: Submit a video URL for clip extraction

actions.name: get_job_status
actions.description: Poll the status of a clip extraction job

actions.name: health_check
actions.description: Check if the skill service is healthy

optional.openai: For Whisper API transcription and GPT-4o-mini ranking (default, working path)
optional.mistralai: For Mistral API LLM ranking - cheap, needs a free-tier API key
optional.torch: For wav2vec 2.0 or Phi-3 local inference
optional.llama-cpp-python: For local Llama-2 GGUF inference (you must supply the model weights)

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key. Required for the default providers (openai/openai); not needed if you override both llm_provider and stt_provider to non-OpenAI options.

KLIPP_API_KEY.description: Optional secret. If set, /jobs and /clips require it in the X-API-Key header. /skill and /healthz stay open.

KLIPP_BASE_URL.description: Optional. Set to your deployment URL so clip download_url fields are absolute instead of relative.

DEFAULT_LLM_PROVIDER.description: Default LLM provider if not specified in request

DEFAULT_STT_PROVIDER.description: Default STT provider if not specified in request

MISTRAL_API_KEY.description: Required only if llm_provider='mistral' is used on a request

PHAROS_ENABLED.description: Master switch for webhook notifications on job completion/failure

PHAROS_WEBHOOK_URL.description: Optional default webhook target used when a request doesn't supply its own webhook_url

error_handling.download_failed: 500 Internal Server Error - Could not download video
error_handling.transcription_failed: 500 Internal Server Error - Transcription service unavailable
error_handling.processing_timeout: 504 Gateway Timeout - Job exceeded maximum processing time
error_handling.service_unavailable: 503 Service Unavailable - Redis or processing service down

clips.reason: Strong hook — opens with a surprising claim

testing.status: No automated test suite exists yet. This section is a known gap, not a claim of coverage.

support.discord: Join the Pharos Discord community for support
